en.extract:
The Moluccan owlet-nightjar (Aegotheles crinifrons), also known as the long-whiskered owlet-nightjar, is a species of bird in the family Aegothelidae. It is endemic to the northern Moluccas.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''Moluccan owlet-nightjar''' ('''''Aegotheles crinifrons'''''), also known as the '''long-whiskered owlet-nightjar''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Aegothelidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the northern [[Moluccas]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
